message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run (round 5)

Fifth pass of artifact regeneration on top of the BufferView
overflow / wide-FILE / forkpty / btrfs-hex-dump / mvcc validate /
mount-scrub-config commits. Same shape as the prior four
"chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs ..." commits — pure
timestamp/duration churn with no schema, status, or pass/fail
diffs:

- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json — generated_at_unix_ms / ts_utc_unix_ms /
  duration_ms only.
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json — ts_utc_unix_ms only.
- artifacts/testing/logs/{fj-core, fj-interpreters, fj-trace,
  fj-conformance, fj-ad, fj-dispatch}/*.json — per-test timestamps.
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json — run_id /
  started_at / finished_at / per-gate timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
